tracks.rawText: 4:46Devil Knock Rhythmv5.5Idol pop rock with a syncopated bluesy clean electric guitar riff under slight wah-wah, steady backbeat and eighth-note hi-hats, funky melodic bass guitar, and audience-cheer ambience, Male vocals carry soulful grit, punchy gang shouts, bright chorus harmonies, and a spoken section where the words land like percussion hits2PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 5:44Lose Control (Live at The Ryman) [1765147836]UploadPop rock with soul and funk influences, Features clean and overdriven electric guitars, electric bass, acoustic drum kit, and Hammond organ, The arrangement centers on syncopated guitar riffs and a driving backbeat, Male lead vocals utilize a wide range, including soulful grit and falsetto, The bass guitar performs melodic fills and syncopated sixteenth-note patterns, Guitars employ wah-wah effects and bluesy lead lines, Tempo is 105 BPM in the key of G major3PublishRemix
tracks.title: Lose Control (Live at The Ryman) [1765147836]

tracks.rawText: 4:27Guiding StarUploadContemporary acoustic pop ballad featuring a soulful tenor male vocal, The arrangement centers on a fingerpicked acoustic guitar and a grand piano that provides melodic counterpoint and chordal swells, A fretless electric bass enters in the second verse, playing melodic fills and sliding notes, Percussion is minimal, consisting of a soft kick drum on downbeats and subtle shaker patterns, The vocal performance uses a mix of chest voice and light falsetto with moderate plate reverb, The track is in 4/4 time at 72 BPM in the key of E Major3PublishRemix
tracks.title: Guiding Star

tracks.rawText: 7:59Colinda [2225438135]v5.5CoverTraditional Christmas carol in a major key at a moderate tempo, built verse-chorus, Prominent church organ anchors rich harmony, with arpeggiated grand piano, soft string pads, and glockenspiel bell tones, Female choir sings unison and close harmony; male lead baritone stays clear and resonant, with a solemn, unsettling undercurrentHomelone1PublishRemix
